prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 painterly academic oil portrait in the style of William-Adolphe Bouguereau, but with a subtle modern internet-culture twist. Depict a beautiful young woman as a classical woodland nymph seated on mossy rocks beside a dark reflective stream in an enchanted forest. She has long flowing pastel pink hair, soft fair skin, a delicate oval face, and a dreamy thoughtful expression as she looks off to the left rather than at the viewer. She wears oversized black rectangular eyeglasses, intentionally anachronistic against the classical setting. Her outfit is a translucent Greco-Roman draped gown in ivory cream with pale blush-pink sheer fabric, gathered at one shoulder, cinched with a thin gold rope belt, slipping softly from one shoulder, with layered gauzy folds over her lap and legs. Add a floral laurel crown of small wildflowers and leaves around her head, a delicate floral armband on her upper arm, and a long pink ribbon trailing behind her in the breeze. Pose her sitting three-quarter view on a rock: one hand braced on the stone at her side, the other resting near her knee, one bare leg extended down toward the water with a bare foot touching the shallow stream. Surround her with exactly three main visible flower clusters: one in the crown, one small cluster at her upper arm, and one cluster of daisies and wildflowers growing to the right of the rock. The environment should include moss-covered boulders, calm dark water with golden reflections, dense leafy trees, filtered warm sunlight, atmospheric haze, and a romantic mythological mood. Use highly refined realistic anatomy, porcelain skin, luminous chiaroscuro, soft glazing, delicate brush texture, muted earth tones, golden backlight, and museum-quality 19th-century academic painting detail. No text, no watermark, no modern objects except the glasses.
promptEn: Create a vertical 3:4 painterly academic oil portrait in the style of William-Adolphe Bouguereau, but with a subtle modern internet-culture twist. Depict a beautiful young woman as a classical woodland nymph seated on mossy rocks beside a dark reflective stream in an enchanted forest. She has long flowing pastel pink hair, soft fair skin, a delicate oval face, and a dreamy thoughtful expression as she looks off to the left rather than at the viewer. She wears oversized black rectangular eyeglasses, intentionally anachronistic against the classical setting. Her outfit is a translucent Greco-Roman draped gown in ivory cream with pale blush-pink sheer fabric, gathered at one shoulder, cinched with a thin gold rope belt, slipping softly from one shoulder, with layered gauzy folds over her lap and legs. Add a floral laurel crown of small wildflowers and leaves around her head, a delicate floral armband on her upper arm, and a long pink ribbon trailing behind her in the breeze. Pose her sitting three-quarter view on a rock: one hand braced on the stone at her side, the other resting near her knee, one bare leg extended down toward the water with a bare foot touching the shallow stream. Surround her with exactly three main visible flower clusters: one in the crown, one small cluster at her upper arm, and one cluster of daisies and wildflowers growing to the right of the rock. No text, no watermark, no modern objects except the glasses.
promptZh: 创作一幅 3:4 竖构图的学院派油画风格肖像，致敬威廉·阿道夫·布格罗（William-Adolphe Bouguereau），并融入微妙的现代互联网文化元素。画面描绘一位美丽的年轻女子，化身为古典森林仙女，坐在魔法森林中深色反光溪流旁的苔藓岩石上。她拥有长而飘逸的 柔粉色 秀发、白皙柔嫩的肌肤、精致的鹅蛋脸，神情梦幻而沉思，目光望向左侧而非注视观众。她佩戴着超大号黑色长方形眼镜，与古典背景形成刻意的时代错位感。她身穿一件象牙奶油色与淡腮红粉色薄纱材质的半透明希腊罗马式垂褶长裙，单肩处褶皱收拢，系着细金绳腰带，长裙从一侧肩膀轻轻滑落，层叠的轻纱覆盖在膝盖和腿部。她的头上戴着由小野花和叶子编织而成的花冠，上臂佩戴精致的花卉臂环，一条粉色长丝带在微风中飘动。她以四分之三侧面姿势坐在岩石上：一只手撑在身侧的石头上，另一只手放在膝盖附近，一条赤裸的腿向下伸向水面，赤足轻触浅浅的溪水。画面中应包含恰好三簇主要花卉：一簇在花冠上，一簇在上臂，另一簇雏菊和野花生长在岩石右侧。环境应包括覆盖苔藓的巨石、平静的深色水面与金色倒影、茂密的树木、过滤后的暖阳、大气薄雾以及浪漫的神话氛围。运用高度精炼的写实解剖结构、瓷器般的肌肤、明暗对照法、柔和的罩染技法、细腻的笔触质感、柔和的大地色调、金色背光以及博物馆级的 19 世纪学院派绘画细节。画面中不含文字、水印，除眼镜外不含任何现代物品。
